'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 4''' was the fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 23]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]]. It also contained original illustrations by [[Carl Lyons]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*The [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] {{C|HOT 1-6}}
:**<small>The first big setback for the Rebels, at the battle on the ice planet.</small>
:'''Characters''': 
:*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] {{C|SKY 1-4}}
:**<small>The humble farmboy who found a new life as the last of the Jedi.</small>
:*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Ozzel]] {{C|OZZ 1-2}}
:**<small>The "by-the-book" officer who met his end at the hands of Darth Vader.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''': 
:*[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] {{C|DAG 1-4}}
:**<small>Dangerous denizens of the swamp planet, home to Jedi Master Yoda.</small>
:'''Droids''': 
:*[[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88 Assassin Droid]] {{C|ASS 1-2}}
:**<small>Terrifying assassin droid that became a feared bounty hunter.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''': 
:*[[Thermal detonator/Legends|ThermalDetonators]] {{C|THE 1-2}}
:**<small>Powerful explosive devices used by stormtroopers, bounty hunters, and Rebels.</small>
:'''Vehicles''': 
:*[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{C|MIL 1-2}}
:**<small>Han Solo and Chewbacca's battle-scarred ship became an icon of the Rebellion.</small>
